title: The Lost Grimoire
description: Master Helvant confides that his own master's spellbook - a grimoire of great power - was lost decades ago in the ruins of Willow Dale. The tome contains advanced techniques that could accelerate your training. However, Willow Dale is dangerous, filled with undead and magical traps. Helvant warns that some pages may be missing, stolen by scavengers over the years.

objectives.description: Travel to the Willow Dale ruins
Search the ruins for the ancient library chamber
objectives.notes: Deep in Willow Dale dungeon, past magical traps

objectives.description: Defeat the magical guardian protecting the grimoire
objectives.notes: Summoned elemental or construct guarding the tome
Quest item - cannot be sold or dropped

objectives.description: Return the grimoire to Master Helvant

spawn_on_accept.notes: Magical construct guarding the grimoire chamber
Only spawns after guardian is defeated

notes: Fourth quest - dungeon delve with boss fight. Grimoire is recovered but Helvant discovers pages are missing, leading to next quest. Rewards Lightning Bolt spell.
